final:
module comparator (
    input [32-1:1-1] a,
    input [31:0] b,
    output reg [1:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (a > b) begin
            result = 2'b10; // a > b
        end else if (a < b) begin
            result = 2'b01; // a < b
        end else begin
            result = 2'b00; // a == b
        end
    end
endmodule
